title: Software Developer
description: Build and maintain web applications, collaborate with product teams, and ship clean code.

title: Cook
description: Prepare meals, manage kitchen stations, and maintain food safety and presentation standards.

title: Warehouse Worker
description: Handle inventory, pack and ship orders, and maintain a clean and organized warehouse.

title: Machine Operator
description: Operate machinery, monitor production processes, and ensure quality control standards are met.

title: Barista
description: Prepare and serve coffee beverages, maintain cleanliness of the café area, and provide excellent customer service.
